headline: Kashkari signals rate hike this year
detail: Minneapolis Fed President Kashkari saying he expects a rate hike is the single most market-moving headline here. Rate hikes reprice high-multiple growth stocks lower — that's PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, and your entire tech/chip concentration. On margin, a valuation compression move hits you harder than a cash account.

headline: Trump: Iran violated ceasefire, drone attacks on Hormuz ships
detail: Strait of Hormuz tension raises oil prices and global risk-off sentiment. Risk-off flows out of high-beta tech names like yours first. If this escalates, expect pressure across SMH, QQQ, and your speculative positions like SPCX and SPAL.

headline: New bill caps Medicare annual costs at $5,000
detail: Healthcare spending legislation is a macro fiscal story — adds to government deficit concerns, which feeds into the bond market and rate expectations. Indirectly reinforces the higher-for-longer rate narrative that already pressures your tech-heavy book.
